memory.title: Memory System
memory.export.buttonTitle: Export all narrative history as a text file
memory.tier.short.title: Short-term Memory
memory.tier.short.hint: Narrative snapshots from recent rounds, serving as the AI's immediate context
memory.tier.implicit.title: Implicit Mid-term
memory.tier.implicit.hint: The AI's structured understanding of each short-term memory, paired 1:1
memory.tier.mid.title: Mid-term Memory
memory.tier.mid.hint: Promoted from short-term overflow; triggers long-term summary when threshold is reached
memory.tier.long.title: Long-term Memory
memory.tier.long.hint: The product of worldview evolution — the AI's deep understanding of the entire story arc
memory.tier.emptyState: This journey has not yet left a trace at this tier
memory.bookmark.title: Bookmarked Rounds
memory.bookmark.hint: Rounds you manually bookmarked. Rename, jump, or remove them. When ticked, injected once next round for the AI to reference.
memory.bookmark.selectHint: When ticked, injected once next round for the AI to reference
memory.bookmark.emptyState: No bookmarks yet. Tap ☆ on any round in the game panel to bookmark it.
memory.narrative.emptyHint: Each round's AI narration and your choices will settle here, gradually weaving a story that belongs to you alone
memory.config.flowCaption: Memory sinks layer by layer from short-term; numbers indicate capacity or threshold at each tier
memory.config.row.shortTermLimit.label: Short-term Capacity
memory.config.row.shortTermLimit.desc: Number of recent entries retained in short-term memory
memory.config.row.longTermCap.label: Long-term Cap
memory.config.row.longTermCap.desc: Maximum number of entries stored in long-term memory
memory.config.row.midTermRefineThreshold: Triggers long-term summary when mid-term memory reaches this count
memory.config.row.longTermSummaryThresho: Amount of mid-term memory that triggers worldview evolution
memory.config.row.longTermSummarizeCount: Number of mid-term memories consumed per long-term summary
memory.config.row.midTermKeep.label: Mid-term Retain Count
memory.config.row.midTermKeep.desc: Number of newest mid-term entries retained after long-term summary
memory.config.footerHint: These settings come from engine defaults and settings panel overrides. To modify, go to the memory section in the Settings panel.
